subject: Re: Tuesday class — can we shift a week?
body:
Rachel — let's move you to Wednesday 7pm this once so you don't miss the loose-floral demo. Bring the deadline stress and we'll paint it out.

Emily, you're welcome Wednesday too if that's easier.

— Maria

subject: Board note — June newsletter
body: Pastor Keith — here's my board note for June. Outreach budget is on track, and the free dental screening day is a go for late summer if the church handles sign-ups. I'll bring two hygienists and the portable chair.\n\n— Maria

subject: Re: Sunday lunch and wedding dress fitting
body: Nicole — Sunday lunch, yes, count me in after church. For the fitting, I have an off-Saturday from clinic on the 12th — let's grab that one before fall gets away from us. Maid of honor reporting for duty.\n\nLove, Maria

subject: Re: Brushes from the Vermont maker arrived
body: Emily — thank you, the pointed round is the one I wanted. Let's let the class try them Saturday and put in the bigger Etsy order if they take. Hold mine aside.\n\nMaria

subject: Re: Friday dinner — same place?
body: Lisa — Al-Ameer at 7, wouldn't miss it. Bring the whole green-card saga; I'll bring the one about a four-year-old and a balloon. We'll trade.\n\nMaria

subject: Re: Referral — pediatric patient from my office
body: Rachel — happy to take them. Have your front desk send records once the release is signed and we'll get the family in for a gentle first visit. Tell the parents to bring a comfort toy.\n\nMaria

subject: Re: Newsletter draft — your board note
body: Diane — adding the chair figure now. Pastor Keith, it's in the fellowship-hall line of the outreach tab. Final note back to you tonight.\n\nMaria

subject: Re: Sunday lunch — what should I make?
body: Mom — carnitas, perfect. I'll bring a salad and the Sleeping Bear watercolor for Dad to admire (not touch). See you after church.\n\nLove, Maria

subject: Prerequisite module access
body: Hello — could you confirm the prerequisite modules unlock on the 24th? I'd like to start them before the summer clinic schedule fills up. Thank you.\n\nMaria Sandoval

subject: July session — loose florals
body: Friends — July's focus is loose florals in watercolor. We meet Saturdays at 2 at the Arts Center, Tuesdays 7pm at my home studio. Bring a flower that means something to you.\n\nWarmly, Maria

subject: Plein air by the river
body: Rachel — let's do a plein air morning at the Rouge when your deadline clears. Early light on the water is worth the alarm. I'll bring coffee and extra paper.\n\nMaria

subject: Thank you — spring class series
body: Dear Carla — thank you for hosting the spring watercolor series again. The new students stayed engaged right through the wet-on-wet weeks. Glad to continue into fall.\n\nMaria Sandoval

subject: Supply reorder — pediatric fluoride varnish
body: Hello — we'd like to reorder the pediatric fluoride varnish and the smaller prophy angles for Bright Smiles. Sara has our account number. Standard delivery is fine.\n\nMaria Sandoval

subject: Summer schedule — every-other Saturday clinic
body: Sara, Dana — with the screening day and the wedding coming up, let's map the every-other-Saturday clinic blocks through September now. I'll need the off-Saturdays protected.\n\nMaria

subject: Screening day — supply list
body: Pastor Keith — here's the rough list for the screening day: portable chair, exam kits, toothbrushes for giveaways, and a sign-up sheet capped at forty kids. I'll cover supplies from the practice.\n\nMaria

subject: Photos from the studio
body: Mom, Dad — sending a few photos of the finished commission before it ships. The dunes turned out the way I hoped. See you Sunday.\n\nLove, Maria

subject: Wedding logistics
body: Jason — are you flying in the Thursday before Nicole's wedding or cutting it close like always? Maid of honor needs the brother wrangled. Let me know your dates.\n\nMaria

subject: Instructor hours — June
body: Hello — logging my June instructor hours: Saturday classes and the art fair demo prep. Let me know if you need the form completed differently.\n\nMaria Sandoval

subject: Reminder — Saturday class this week
body: Friends — a gentle reminder we meet this Saturday at 2 for the wet-on-wet skies session. Bring your blue and a steady hand. See you there.\n\nWarmly, Maria

subject: Re: Demo palette for Saturday
body: Emily — keep the palette limited Saturday; the new students drown a painting the second you hand them ten colors. Three pigments and water. I'll bring the chart.\n\nMaria

subject: Re: Bridesmaid colors
body: Nicole — the sage green you picked is perfect, much kinder than the swatch Jason suggested. Tell Karim he has excellent in-laws. See you Sunday.\n\nLove, Maria
